campusApplicabilityProofsFound.proofQuote: You are required to wear your white lab coat at all times while on the premises at AdventHealth Redmond
At AdventHealth Redmond, we welcome medical students who are eager to learn the highest caliber of skills to provide exceptional care that heals the whole person.
To learn more about clerkship opportunities at AdventHealth Redmond, please call our clerkship coordinator Susan Alexander at 706-802-3063 .
